description: This file defines theme variables and styles for a Bootstrap-based project, including color variables, theme-specific overrides, and CSS custom properties.

methods.name: lighten
methods.description: Adjusts the lightness of a color to make it lighter.

methods.name: saturate
methods.description: Increases the saturation of a color.

methods.name: to-rgb
methods.description: Converts a color to its RGB representation.

methods.name: adjust-color
methods.description: Adjusts properties of a color, such as lightness.

methods.name: color-mode
methods.description: Applies different styles based on the color mode (light or dark).
